details: Draft preview pages are written to draft_output/pages/ and are not included in sitemap.
Static review dashboard is available at draft_output/admin_review.html and draft_output/review_dashboard/index.html.
Dashboard tab Duyệt nội dung can create, edit, approve, reject, and publish approved static drafts.
Approved drafts can be published manually from dashboard only after quality guardrails pass; local static preview exists. Current generated site pages remain pipeline-managed.
Guardrails check screenshot, word count, CTA, internal links, duplicate title/meta, placeholders, and broken links for queue/reporting.
2 rows loaded from data/content_drafts.csv and affiliate_os_drafts.json import layer.
